items.claim: Conor McGregor is coming off a five-year layoff.
Max Holloway has only been knocked out one time in his entire UFC career.
items.quote: the guy's only been knocked out one time in his entire UFC career.

items.claim: Max Holloway's durability has been waning recently.
items.quote: Even though Max has legendary durability, it has been waning just a little bit.

items.claim: Conor McGregor is not the best at overcoming adversity.
items.quote: one thing about McGregor is he's not the best at overcoming adversity.

items.claim: Conor McGregor historically struggles with cardio in the later rounds.
items.quote: if even in his prime, he's one of these guys where it's a super fast start and then he falls off a cliff

items.claim: Max Holloway is a slow starter who can be rocked early in fights.
items.quote: Max is a very slow starter. And we've seen Max get rocked early in a lot of fights

items.claim: Conor McGregor will experience an adrenaline dump if he fails to finish Max Holloway early.
items.quote: if he cannot put Max down in those first three minutes, Max is going to punch him in the face over and over

items.claim: Max Holloway will stop Conor McGregor in this fight.
items.quote: I think that Max Holloway is going to come out here and stop the great Conor McGregor.
